'''Natja''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Marg Sonat]], who [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] her with a [[vernelian parasite]].

==Biography==
Natja attended an auction held by [[Sard Nightbringer]] that was held on the ''[[Stellar Mermaid]]''. It was for a prototype personal shield generator and Natja won it with a bid of 100 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. After the auction, she got suspicious with a couple of spacers who were present when she recognized they were impersonating [[Morgotou]] and invited them to her suite so she could get more information. While there, she died after ingesting a parasite that caused a lethal release of neuro-toxins.<ref name="AB" />
{{Char-stub}}
